name: searchLiterature
description: Search the configured literature connector (arxiv, Semantic Scholar, web search, ...) for candidate sources

query.description: Search query — plain text or connector-specific operators

sourceTypes.description: Optional filter on the source types to return

yearFrom.description: Optional inclusive lower bound on publication year

yearTo.description: Optional inclusive upper bound on publication year

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

name: classifyPaper
description: Record structured metadata for a paper or article encountered during a literature review

sourceId.description: Identifier or URL of the source

topics.description: Topic tags (free-form but preferably drawn from the review's theme map)

qualityScore.description: Reviewer's confidence in the paper's evidence (1 = weak, 5 = strong)

notes.description: Free-form notes — limitations, caveats, or questions for follow-up
